HORIZONTAL_PUSH.description: Moderate systemic fatigue. Recovery depends on load and volume.

VERTICAL_PUSH.description: Moderate fatigue due to shoulder and triceps involvement.

HORIZONTAL_PULL.description: Moderate fatigue with relatively good recovery capacity.

VERTICAL_PULL.description: Moderate fatigue affecting the upper back and grip.

SQUAT.description: Very high systemic fatigue. Large muscle mass and axial loading.

HINGE.description: Very high fatigue due to posterior chain loading and spinal demand.

LUNGE.description: High fatigue because of unilateral balance and lower-body demand.

SHOULDER_ABDUCTION.description: Low fatigue with primarily local muscular demand.

CORE_FLEXION.description: Low fatigue with localized abdominal work.

ANTI_EXTENSION.description: Low fatigue with emphasis on trunk stability.

ROTATION.description: Low fatigue when performed with proper control.

CARRY.description: High whole-body fatigue due to grip, core and conditioning demands.
